TimeEntry.Title: Login to the Huntress portal and check policies and Security settings
TimeEntry.Notes: Login to the Huntress portal and check policies and Security settings

TimeEntry.Title: KevinT,MattW,Kevin-Maahs, RyansWin11, has Missing patch while last run
TimeEntry.Notes:
I worked on the Missing patches and logged into the ManageEngine portal to review the approved patches for the machines. I downloaded and manually installed the applicable failed patches, then rebooted  Some patches not applicable due to non compatibility. All previously missing patches were successfully updated.

Machines are KevinT,MattW,Kevin-Maahs,RyansWin11


Patches are Update for Microsoft 365 Apps for Business Current Channel for x64 2602 of version(19725.20172)
Google Chrome (x64) (146.0.7680.75,146.0.7680.76)
Mozilla Firefox (x64) (148.0.2)
Update for Microsoft 365 Apps for Business Current Channel for x64 2602 of version(19725.20172)
UHD Graphics 630 (Desktop)[PCI\\VEN_8086&DEV_3E92] (31.0.101.2137
Zoom Workplace (EXE) (x64) (User Based) (6.7.8.32670)

TimeEntry.Title: ChadMorris,Matyas has Missing patch while last run
TimeEntry.Notes:
I worked on the missing patches and logged into the ManageEngine portal to review the approved patches for the machines. I downloaded and manually installed the applicable failed patches. Then, ChadMorris was pending for reboot due to some files being open, and some patches were not applicable due to compatibility issues. All previously missing patches were successfully updated.

Machines: Matyas, ChadMorris

Patches:

Update for Microsoft 365 Apps for Business Current Channel for x64 2602 (version 19725.20172)

Google Chrome (x64) (146.0.7680.75, 146.0.7680.76)

Mozilla Firefox (x64) (148.0.2)

UHD Graphics 630 (Desktop) [PCI\VEN_8086&DEV_3E92] (31.0.101.2137)

Zoom Workplace (EXE) (x64) (User Based) (6.7.8.32670)

TimeEntry.Title: RyansWin11, ChadMorris has Missing patch while last run
TimeEntry.Notes:
I worked on the missing patches and logged into the ManageEngine portal to review the approved patches for the machines. I downloaded and manually installed the applicable failed patches.rebooted RyansWin11 But in ChadMorris some files were open so did not reboot and some patches were not applicable due to compatibility issues. All previously missing patches were successfully updated.

Machines: RyansWin11, ChadMorris

 Patches:

Google Chrome (x64) (146.0.7680.80)

TimeEntry.Title: Matyas,Kevin-Maahs has Missing patch while last run
TimeEntry.Notes:
I worked on the missing patches and logged into the ManageEngine portal to review the approved patches for the machines. I downloaded and manually installed the applicable failed patches.rebooted Matyas,Kevin-Maahs. some patches were not applicable due to compatibility issues. All previously missing patches were successfully updated.

Machines: Matyas,Kevin-Maahs

Patches:

Update for Microsoft WebView2 Runtime (x64) (146.0.3856.59)
Google Chrome (x64) (146.0.7680.80)

TimeEntry.Title: SAS– Network Detective Report Generated and Updated Under Teams
TimeEntry.Notes: As per assigned task by lead, Network Detective reports were generated successfully for SAS Client. Checked and verified the reports are proper. Then uploaded the report to the appropriate client Teams channel for SAS. It is now ready for review and take actions on alerts.
